arts.ttl: Mainoo? Ugarte? Casemiro? Man Utd's best midfielder could leave for free
arts.sum: Eriksen has started all of Man Utd's last four games and has been an unexpected standout performer, keeping Casemiro out of the side in the Premier League after his horror showing against Liverpool . The 32-year-old's goal against the Eredivisie side was brilliantly taken and hammered home the point that he has arguably been Man Utd's best option in midfield so far in this still-young season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag admits he still misses trusted Man Utd ally axed by Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag made a number of changes to his coaching staff over the summer after part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe prompted a major overhaul

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw LIVE - Chelsea, Manchester United and Man City to learn next opponents
arts.sum: Plenty of big clubs are left in the draw hoping to replace Liverpool as champions

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag doubles down on Marcus Rashford decision after 'crazy' Man Utd theory
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford returned to Manchester United’s starting line-up for their Europa League opener against Dutch side FC Twente and Erik ten Hag has opened up on the the striker’s place in his squad

arts.ttl: LIVE: FC Twente vs. Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag hosts his former club to kick off their Europa League campaign. ESPN has live action.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho and Manchester United got it wrong with £72m deal - but it was destined to fail
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho is currently on loan at Chelsea from Manchester United after struggling badly at Old Trafford since joining from Borussia Dortmund in 2021

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth round draw LIVE: Man Utd, Chelsea and rivals discover fate
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are both in Carabao Cup action on Wednesday evening and will discover their opponents should they progress to the next round of the competition

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag explains Marcus Rashford handling at Manchester United after questions from pundits
arts.sum: Man Utd play FC Twente in the Europa League on Wednesday night and Erik ten Hag spoke ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Secret meeting, Mourinho fury - How Sir Alex Ferguson convinced Raphael Varane on Man Utd destiny
arts.sum: The former Real Madrid and Manchester United defender retired early today, despite being just 31 years old - but he almost arrived at Old Trafford a decade earlier than he eventually did, in 2021

arts.ttl: Rashford returns to Man Utd lineup as Ten Hag names team to face Twente
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has returned to the Manchester United starting lineup after Erik ten Hag named his team to face FC Twente. The Red Devils begin their Uefa Europa League campaign by entertaining the Dutch outfit at Old Trafford on Wednesday evening. It’s the first of eight matches they will play in the new expanded format […] The post Rashford returns to Man Utd lineup as Ten Hag names team to face Twente first appeared on The Football Faithful.
